headline: HWC to Expand in High-Growth Orlando Market, Acquire OFB Bancshares
summary: Hancock Whitney will buy OFB Bancshares for $377.6M in cash, expanding into fast-growing Orlando and boosting Florida deposits.

headline: Expanding Opportunity in Cleveland: KeyBank and MetroHealth in Action
summary: CLEVELAND, OH / ACCESS Newswire / May 18, 2026 / At KeyBank, being a hometown bank means investing in the people and neighborhoods we serve. Our partnership with The MetroHealth Foundation brings that commitment to life across Cuyahoga County. In ...
